description: Simple revenue distribution contract. Receives USDC when the vault forwards deducted funds and lets the admin distribute those funds to developer wallets individually or in batch.

functions.name: init
functions.description: Initialize the revenue pool with an admin and the USDC token address. Can only be called once. The admin must authorize the call.

params.name: admin
params.description: Address that may call distribute, batch_distribute, receive_payment, and set_admin.

params.name: usdc_token
params.description: Stellar USDC (or wrapped USDC) token contract address.

panics: "revenue pool already initialized" — called more than once.

functions.name: pause
functions.description: Activate the circuit-breaker. Blocks distribute and batch_distribute until unpause is called. Admin rotation (set_admin / claim_admin) remains available while paused.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the current admin; must authorize.

panics: "unauthorized: caller is not admin" — caller != current admin.
"revenue pool already paused" — pool is already paused.

functions.name: unpause
functions.description: Deactivate the circuit-breaker, restoring distribute and batch_distribute.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the current admin; must authorize.

panics: "unauthorized: caller is not admin" — caller != current admin.
"revenue pool not paused" — pool is not currently paused.

functions.name: is_paused
functions.description: Return true if the revenue pool is currently paused, false otherwise. Defaults to false before any pause call.

functions.name: distribute
functions.description: Transfer USDC from this contract to a developer wallet. Admin only. Blocked while paused.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the current admin; must authorize.

params.name: amount
params.description: Amount in USDC base units; must be > 0.

panics: "revenue pool is paused" — pool is paused.
"unauthorized: caller is not admin" — caller != current admin.
"amount must be positive" — amount <= 0.
"revenue pool not initialized" — called before init.
"insufficient USDC balance" — contract holds less than amount.

functions.name: batch_distribute
functions.description: Atomically distribute USDC to multiple developer wallets. Validates the total against the available balance before any transfer. One event is emitted per payment. Admin only. Blocked while paused.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the current admin; must authorize.

params.name: payments
params.description: Ordered list of (developer_address, amount) pairs. All amounts must be > 0.

panics: "revenue pool is paused" — pool is paused.
"unauthorized: caller is not admin" — caller != current admin.
"amount must be positive" — any individual amount <= 0.
"total overflow" — extremely unlikely sum overflow.
"revenue pool not initialized" — called before init.
"insufficient USDC balance" — total amount exceeds contract balance.

functions.name: receive_payment
functions.description: Event-only helper — does NOT move tokens. Emits a receive_payment event for indexer alignment when the backend wants to log a payment credited from the vault. USDC is received passively when any address transfers tokens to this contract; no explicit call is required for token receipt.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the current admin; must authorize.

params.name: amount
params.description: Amount received (for event logging only; no tokens are moved).

params.name: from_vault
params.description: True if the source was the vault contract.

panics: "unauthorized: caller is not admin" — caller != current admin.

functions.name: balance
functions.description: Return the contract's current USDC balance.
panics: "revenue pool not initialized" — called before init.

functions.name: get_admin
panics: "revenue pool not initialized" — called before init.

functions.name: set_admin
functions.description: Initiate replacement of the current admin. The proposed new admin must call claim_admin to complete the transfer.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the current admin; must authorize.

params.name: new_admin
params.description: Address of the proposed new admin.

panics: "unauthorized: caller is not admin" — caller != current admin.

functions.name: claim_admin
functions.description: Complete the admin transfer. Must be called by the pending admin set via set_admin.

params.name: caller
params.description: Must be the pending admin; must authorize.

panics: "no pending admin" — set_admin was not called first.
"unauthorized: caller is not pending admin" — caller is not the pending admin.
